form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last three starts, most recently over 457m at this track. Look for improvement. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Placed last time (26.48) at this track in a Class 3/4, finishing second and beaten 1.75 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 2.25 lengths in a Class 4 last start at Manawatu, clocking a scintillating 25.51 over the 457m trip. Key chance.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Addington (17.27) in a Class 4, finishing a 1.3 lengths second. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Prefer others.

formComments.comment: In the money last time at Addington (17.27) in a Class 4, finishing a 1.3 lengths second. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was a strong winner after racing just off the speed, scoring by 0.7 lengths in a Class 2/3 at Addington. More than capable and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference, checked and forced wide around bend, faltered and lost ground.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 5 at Addington over 525m. Last start was second over 525m in 30.01, behind Opawa Fannin. Boxed on well last time to hit the frame. Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Nearing another win after her success on March 5 at Addington over 525m. Last start was second over 525m in 30.01, behind Opawa Fannin. Boxed on well last time to hit the frame. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last five starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Class 3/4 on March 31 over 457m at this track behind Chilly Pepper beaten 3 lengths (26.57). Has clocked a superb 25.87 Best Time here at the trip. Has ability and among the chances.

Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 295m at Addington. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
